author: Joshua Martinez
name: SP1024 + Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 (Track A - No TTT)
blurb: Track A baseline with 3-layer depth recurrence (11→14 virtual layers). No pre-quant TTT (legality concerns). Hyperparameters from PR #1487: QK-Gain 5.25, WD 0.095, warmdown 0.72. SP1024 tokenizer saves ~4M params for architecture capacity.
run_notes: Track A baseline: depth recurrence (L3-5) replaces looping (L4-5). No TTT. Expected ~1.08-1.09 BPB. Tests if depth recurrence beats our previous looping approach.
